mapper.select: select id, user_id, title, description, education, position, create_time, update_time, status, min_salary, max_salary, salary, company_id, treatment, collect_number from employment where id = #{id}

select et.id, et.user_id, et.title, et.description, et.education, et.position, et.create_time, et.update_time, et.status, et.min_salary, et.max_salary, et.salary, et.company_id, et.treatment, et.collect_number, cy.id as company_company_id, cy.company_number as company_company_number, cy.name as company_name, cy.description as company_description, cy.user_id as company_user_id, cy.create_time as company_create_time, cy.update_time as company_update_time, cy.status as company_status, cy.processor as company_processor, cy.reply_time as company_reply_time, cy.reply_content as company_reply_content, cy.number as company_number, cy.category as company_category, cy.nature as company_nature, cy.company_logo as company_company_logo, COALESCE(eu.application_count, 0) as application_count from employment et left join company cy on et.company_id = cy.id left join ( select employment_id, count(*) as application_count from employment_user group by employment_id ) eu on et.id = eu.employment_id
and et.id = #{id}
and et.user_id = #{userId}
and et.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
and et.description = #{description}
and ( et.education = #{education} or (#{education} = 'College_Degree_Or_Above' and et.education = '专科及以上') or (#{education} = 'College_Degree_Or_Above' and et.education = '专科') or (#{education} = 'College_Degree_Or_Above' and et.education = '本科') or (#{education} = 'College_Degree_Or_Above' and et.education = '硕士') or (#{education} = 'College_Degree_Or_Above' and et.education = '博士') or (#{education} = 'Bachelor_Or_Above_Degree' and et.education = '本科及以上') or (#{education} = 'Bachelor_Or_Above_Degree' and et.education = '本科') or (#{education} = 'Bachelor_Or_Above_Degree' and et.education = '硕士') or (#{education} = 'Bachelor_Or_Above_Degree' and et.education = '博士') or (#{education} = 'Master_Degree_Or_Above' and et.education = '研究生及以上') or (#{education} = 'Master_Degree_Or_Above' and et.education = '硕士') or (#{education} = 'Master_Degree_Or_Above' and et.education = '博士') )
and et.position like concat('%', #{position}, '%')
and et.create_time = #{createTime}
and et.update_time = #{updateTime}
and et.status = #{status}
and ( (et.min_salary is not null and CAST(et.min_salary AS UNSIGNED) >= #{minSalary}) or (et.salary like concat('%', #{minSalary}, '%')) )
and ( (et.max_salary is not null and CAST(et.max_salary AS UNSIGNED) <= #{maxSalary}) or (et.salary like concat('%', #{maxSalary}, '%')) )
and et.company_id = #{companyId}
and et.treatment = #{treatment}
and et.position like concat('%', #{cityFilter}, '%')
and ( (et.min_salary REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' and CAST(et.min_salary AS UNSIGNED) < 3) or (et.max_salary REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' and CAST(et.max_salary AS UNSIGNED) < 3) )
and ( (et.min_salary REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' and et.max_salary REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' and CAST(et.min_salary AS UNSIGNED) <= 5 and CAST(et.max_salary AS UNSIGNED) >= 3) )
and ( (et.min_salary REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' and et.max_salary REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' and CAST(et.min_salary AS UNSIGNED) <= 10 and CAST(et.max_salary AS UNSIGNED) >= 5) )
and ( (et.min_salary REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' and et.max_salary REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' and CAST(et.min_salary AS UNSIGNED) <= 15 and CAST(et.max_salary AS UNSIGNED) >= 10) )
and ( (et.min_salary REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' and et.max_salary REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' and CAST(et.min_salary AS UNSIGNED) <= 25 and CAST(et.max_salary AS UNSIGNED) >= 15) )
and ( (et.min_salary REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' and et.max_salary REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' and CAST(et.min_salary AS UNSIGNED) <= 40 and CAST(et.max_salary AS UNSIGNED) >= 25) )
and ( (et.min_salary REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' and CAST(et.min_salary AS UNSIGNED) >= 40) or (et.max_salary REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' and CAST(et.max_salary AS UNSIGNED) >= 40) )
and ( et.education = #{education} or (#{education} = 'College_Degree_Or_Above' and et.education = '专科及以上') or (#{education} = 'College_Degree_Or_Above' and et.education = '专科') or (#{education} = 'College_Degree_Or_Above' and et.education = '本科') or (#{education} = 'College_Degree_Or_Above' and et.education = '硕士') or (#{education} = 'College_Degree_Or_Above' and et.education = '博士') or (#{education} = 'Bachelor_Or_Above_Degree' and et.education = '本科及以上') or (#{education} = 'Bachelor_Or_Above_Degree' and et.education = '本科') or (#{education} = 'Bachelor_Or_Above_Degree' and et.education = '硕士') or (#{education} = 'Bachelor_Or_Above_Degree' and et.education = '博士') or (#{education} = 'Master_Degree_Or_Above' and et.education = '研究生及以上') or (#{education} = 'Master_Degree_Or_Above' and et.education = '硕士') or (#{education} = 'Master_Degree_Or_Above' and et.education = '博士') )
and cy.number <= 20
and cy.number >= 20 and cy.number <= 99
and cy.number >= 100 and cy.number <= 499
and cy.number >= 500 and cy.number <= 999
and cy.number >= 1000 and cy.number <= 9999
and cy.number >= 10000
and et.status = 1 and cy.status = 'Approve'
and cy.id is not null
order by CAST(et.max_salary AS UNSIGNED) desc
order by CAST(et.max_salary AS UNSIGNED) asc
order by et.create_time DESC
order by et.create_time ASC
order by COALESCE(eu.application_count, 0) DESC, et.create_time DESC
order by et.create_time DESC
order by et.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: insert into employment(id, user_id, title, description, education, position, create_time, update_time, status, min_salary, max_salary, salary, company_id, treatment, collect_number) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{education}, #{position}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{status}, #{minSalary}, #{maxSalary}, #{salary}, #{companyId}, #{treatment}, #{collectNumber})
mapper.update:
update employment
user_id = #{userId},
title = #{title},
description = #{description},
education = #{education},
position = #{position},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
status = #{status},
min_salary = #{minSalary},
max_salary = #{maxSalary},
salary = #{salary},
company_id = #{companyId},
treatment = #{treatment},
collect_number = #{collectNumber},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from employment et left join company cy on et.company_id = cy.id where et.status >= 0
select count(*) from employment where status = #{status}
mapper.update: update employment set collect_number = collect_number + 1 where id = #{id}
update employment set collect_number = collect_number - 1 where id = #{id}
